full_name: Department of Guitar Acoustics & Sound Synthesis
domain: Physical modeling of guitar sound, spectral analysis, realism verification
research_areas: Waveguide string modeling and stiff-string dispersion
Body resonance simulation and resonator chain design
Spectral realism metrics and perceptual scoring
Perceptual audio quality and A/B validation
Real-time WASM synthesis with latency constraints
ML-guided parameter optimization for timbral targets
curriculum: Karplus-Strong algorithm — delay line, loop filter, decay
Excitation modeling — pluck shape, position, velocity
Body resonance — resonator chains and cavity modes
Guitar profile design — steel, nylon, jumbo, flamenco
Spectral analysis — FFT, STFT, centroid, rolloff
Realism scoring — spectral distance and perceptual metrics
Effects chain architecture — reverb, EQ, compression
Real-time synthesis constraints and latency budgets
Reference recording methodology and quality validation
Regression detection — ensuring parameter changes preserve realism
